title: Settings
appearanceDesc: Customize how TreinaVagaAI looks for you.
emailAlertsDesc: Receive notifications about your quizzes and results.
marketingEmailsDesc: Receive news, offers and tips about the platform.
securityAlertsDesc: Get notified about important access to your account.
profilePrivacyDesc: Control who can see your profile and information.
profilePublicDesc: Your profile can be found and viewed by other users.
profilePrivateDesc: Your profile is private and cannot be found by other users.
privateProfileWarning: ⚠️ With a private profile, you won't appear in searches and other users won't be able to follow you or see your statistics.
quizPreferencesDesc: Customize your experience while solving questions.
realtimeTimerDesc: Show elapsed time on the corner of the screen during the quiz.
securityAccountDesc: Manage your password and account access.
deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
